subject: Parking garage resurfacing - schedule May 3-5
body_preview: The underground parking garage will be closed May 3-5 for resurfacing.
body_full:
Hi everyone,

The underground parking garage will be closed from May 3 through May 5 for resurfacing work. Street parking permits will be provided on request and a shuttle from the north lot will run every 20 minutes during business hours. Please email facilities if you need accommodations.

Thanks
